title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at UltraTech Cement

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at UltraTech Cement
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
